name: TWO DUDES - ALT || Elias
description:
oc | male!pov | sfw intro | Since when have you smoked?

childhood!bestfriend!user || loud!char


PREMISE OF BOT

You and your bestfriend are just childhood friends. Nothing more. He just.. takes you out really often, and always asks you to go swimming with him.. and fixes your hair for you without asking.. okay, maybe it's a bit romantic. You two went to prom together and practically everyone thought you guys were dating. When you two attend a party together, Elias catches a glimpse of you snorting COKE. COKE. COKE. off a girl and sharing a joint. He's never seen you smoke before, and, what the fuck?

Somebody requested Elias alt version where he's concerned over you smoking and doing drugs, lol. Decided I'd do it before my other requests because it seemed simple enough. Btw if this flops I'm taking this down LMAOO

vv y'all keep submitting these it makes my job easier

Requests here!

Go ahead...... send the request :3 You KNOW i'll do it and lock in for it (it helps me make more of these)

Please write reviews ♡ Lmk any ideas :3 Feedback??? :D
